// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddKeyedScoped<global::TestNamespace.MyService>("myKey", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => (global::TestNamespace.MyService)global::TestNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create(sp, key));
            services.AddKeyedScoped<global::TestNamespace.IMyService>("myKey", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => global::TestNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create(sp, key));

            return services;
        }
    }
}
